name: METLIFE INC
summary: MetLife, Inc. is a leading global financial services company providing insurance, annuities, employee benefits, and asset management. It operates through six segments: Group Benefits, Retirement and Income Solutions (RIS), Asia, Latin America, EMEA, and MetLife Investment Management (MIM). Products include term life, variable life, universal life, dental, disability, accident & health, vision, pet insurance, prepaid legal plans, annuities, and institutional asset management services, sold to corporations, governments, and individuals worldwide.

products.name: Term Life Insurance
products.description: Guaranteed death benefit for a specified period in exchange for periodic premium payments.

products.name: Variable Life Insurance
products.description: Life insurance with flexible investment choices in separate account options or general account.

products.name: Universal Life Insurance
products.description: Life insurance with premiums and balances allocated to the Company's general account.

products.name: Dental Insurance
products.description: Insurance and ASO arrangements to help employees reduce out-of-pocket dental expenses.

products.name: Disability Insurance
products.description: Group and individual coverage for income replacement, business overhead, or mortgage protection.

products.name: Accident & Health Insurance
products.description: Accident, critical illness, or hospital indemnity coverage for insured individuals.

products.name: Vision Insurance
products.description: Insurance, ASO arrangements, and managed eye health coverage for employees and families.

products.name: Pet Insurance
products.description: Insurance coverage for pets, offered as part of Group Benefits voluntary products.

products.name: Prepaid Legal Plans
products.description: Legal plan products offered through the Group Benefits segment.

products.name: Annuities
products.description: Retirement income and income solutions products offered through the RIS segment.

products.name: Institutional Asset Management
products.description: Institutional asset management services provided through MetLife Investment Management (MIM).

products.name: Administrative Services Only (ASO)
products.description: Administrative arrangements sold to employers who self-fund employee benefit plans.

products.name: Paid Family and Medical Leave
products.description: Group benefit providing paid leave coverage for qualifying family or medical events.

products.name: AD&D Insurance
products.description: Accidental death and dismemberment insurance offered within the Group Benefits segment.

partnerships.description: Group Benefits products distributed through brokers and consultants acting as intermediaries.
Group Benefits products sold through associations and affinity group arrangements.
Provides life, dental, accident & health, and vision coverage to certain U.S. Government employees.
